title: Dividend Cut Risk For Tanger But SWAN With Simon

title: Simon® Announces Date For Its Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Release And Conference Call
text: INDIANAPOLIS , Jan. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Simon®, a real estate investment trust engaged in the ownership of premier shopping, dining, entertainment and mixed-use destinations, today announced details for its fourth quarter earnings release and conference call.  Simon's financial and operational results for the quarter ending December 31, 2022, will be released after the market close on February 6, 2023.

title: 5 REIT Resolutions For 2023
